title: limonium minus
intro: Limonium minus, also known as sea lavender, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. The medicinal properties of sea lavender include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of consuming or applying sea lavender preparations include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting better sleep, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds, as well as boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of sea lavender can be found in the form of essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally, depending on the specific preparation and intended use.
